theme: 5 questions every HR director should ask before signing with an event company

linkedin.text:
Before you sign anything, ask these 5 questions.

I've seen companies get burned — not because the event company was dishonest, but because nobody asked the right questions upfront.

1️⃣ "Who will be my day-to-day contact after the contract is signed?"
You want the project manager's name and direct number — not the salesperson.

2️⃣ "How do you handle an emergency on the day of the event?"
A great answer includes a specific protocol, not just "we have experience."

3️⃣ "Can I speak to two recent clients in my industry?"
References matter. If they hesitate — run.

4️⃣ "What's your payment and cancellation policy in detail?"
Force majeure clauses matter more than you think. Read them.

5️⃣ "What does the final accounting process look like?"
Expenses, receipts, reconciliation — you deserve full transparency.

Bonus question: "When did you last have a major problem at an event — and what did you do?"
Every honest answer teaches you everything about how they operate under pressure.

Print this list. Use it.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#HRTips #EventPlanning #CorporateEvents #HRStrategy #UproductionEvents #VendorSelection #IncentiveTravel #HRLeadership

The answer reveals everything about how they work under pressure.
